choices.text: fee = sum(input values) - sum(output values). No explicit fee field. Difference between inputs and outputs goes to miner. Change must be explicit output back to sender.

questions.explanation: Fee = inputs - outputs; implicit miner payment.

choices.text: RBF (Replace By Fee): replace original with higher-fee version if RBF-signaled. Or CPFP (Child Pays For Parent): spend output in new high-fee tx, miner must include parent. Both standard fee bumping.

questions.explanation: RBF or CPFP for fee acceleration.
